title.en: The Lord of Eternal Zero asked.

content.en:
"Ice Beast Palace, what are you doing here?"

The Lord of Eternal Zero asked.

"This is the territory of the top of the Blood Fangs, and the top of the Blood Fangs is loyal to our Ice Beast Palace!" said one of the Origin Realm Ice Beasts coldly.

"Hahaha, Lord of Ice Clouds, you said that the top of the Blood Fang is a subordinate force of your Ice Beast Palace? I also said that not long ago, the top of the Blood Fang took refuge in our Gu Heng Mountain, and now this place belongs to us. And this is the Bloody Domain, you are still the Ice Pole Domain, get out of here!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero, they are not at all polite.

And these Origin Realms of the Ice Beast Palace contacted the Lord of the Blood Fangs, but they couldn't get in touch, so they knew that the Lord of the Blood Fangs should have fallen, and they were a step too late.

This made them very angry!

Although the Lord of the Blood Fang was not a member of their Ice Beast Palace, he was also a subordinate force, and he was a pawn in restricting Gu Heng Mountain.

Now that this chess piece is gone, it is also a huge loss for them.

Soon.

The Ice Beast Palace locked the location of that eighth-level personal world.

"Found it!"

These Origin Realm Ice Beasts simply ignored the Origin Realm of Gu Heng Mountain and came here directly.

They couldn't get in, though.

"Wait for the arrival of the large army of our Ice Beast Palace, and then let those Ice Beasts of the Bone Transformation Realm enter!"

So they planned.

And the Lord of Eternal Zero, they didn't want to fight with the Origin Realm Ice Beasts, they just wanted the Bone Transformation Realm of Gu Heng Mountain to collect the source stones on the other side of this world first.

If there were really a lot of source stones on the other side of this world, enough for them to carry out it completely and comprehensively, then they would do it.

......

At this time.

Ye Tian and the others no longer chased the bone transformation realm at the top of the Blood Fang, but began to look for the source stones on the other side here, and they could find as many source stones as they could.

"It's a pity that with a group of bone transformation realms, there are also a lot of bone transformation realms in this world, if I am alone, I can copy the source beast on the other side, and it will be very easy to find the source beast on the other side!" Ye Tian thought.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian gradually found some source stones on the other side.

I have to say that there are a lot of source stones on the other side of this world, which is a bit abnormal!

And every time you find some source stones on the other side, you have to report the quantity.

Therefore, the Eternal Zero Lord of Ancient Heng Mountain, they can always know how many other source stones have been found by the Venerable Lords under their command.

"The number of source stones on the other side has exceeded 10,000!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero glanced at them, and they both felt that this was too abnormal.

Now that more than 10,000 source stones have been found, the number of source stones on the other side of this world is definitely more than 100,000.

Before, they guessed that there were a lot of source stones on the other side, and it was very likely that they were more than 100,000, but when they really found so many source stones on the other side, they couldn't help but be shocked in their hearts.

"It's not normal for a newborn eighth-level personality world to give birth to so many source stones from the other side. If you want to find a reason, there is only one possibility, this world is not an ordinary eighth-level personal world, it definitely gives birth to a substance. "

The Lord of Eternal Zero said to the other sub-mountain masters.

"That's the other side of the source stone mother!"

The other deputy mountain masters also nodded slightly.

At the beginning, they speculated that this world might have given birth to the Origin Stone Mother of the Other Shore, which would indeed invade the top of the Blood Fang.

Once the Mother Stone of the Other Shore appears somewhere, it is possible to give birth to a lot of Source Stones of the Other Shore.

The source stone of the other side can allow the other side level genius to quickly refine the immeasurable bone and quickly improve the cultivation.

And the role of the Mother of Source Stone on the other side is even greater, it can not only allow the other side level genius to refine the immeasurable bones, if it is cultivated well, it can create a treasure land by itself, and the source stones of the other side will be born continuously.

That is to say, with a piece of the source stone mother of the other side, there will be no shortage of source stones on the other side in the future.

Of course.

It takes a long time to give birth to the source stone of the other side, and a genius of the other side level will definitely not be able to wait, but a force like Gu Hengshan can definitely wait, even if it is taken out and sold, it is unimaginable wealth.

The value of a piece of the Mother Stone of the Other Shore is equivalent to 100,000 pieces of Eternal Ancient Gold if calculated as a piece of Superior Eternal Ancient Gold.

The key is that in such a special world, there may be more than one source stone mother on the other side!

With such a huge wealth, Gu Hengshan was naturally unwilling to give up, nor did he want the Ice Beast Palace to take advantage.

"Let the Heavenly Ancestors above the seven bone transformation realms of the entire Guheng Mountain all enter this eighth-level world, and find out the other side of the source stone mother here as soon as possible. Don't give the Ice Beast Palace any chance, once their Bone Transformation Realm Ice Beasts enter, let some of the Bone Transformation Realm drag them down, and don't let them go to the other side of the Source Stone Mother. "

The Lord of Eternal Zero: They have given orders.

Compared with the Ice Beast Palace, Guheng Mountain is closer here.

And the bone transformation realm brought by the Ice Beast Palace is definitely not much, and it is definitely not as good as Gu Heng Mountain.

This is the advantage of Guheng Mountain.

......

"Looking for the Mother of Stone on the other side!"

Ye Tian received the news and was a little shocked by this mission order.

"There is a source stone mother on the other side in this world?"

He didn't have time to think, so he immediately went to find the other side of the source stone mother.

According to the information given by Gu Heng Mountain, the Mother of the Source Stone on the other side is very hidden, and even gives birth to consciousness, and will know how to hide the breath of the source stone on the other side of the body, and disguise it as an ordinary source stone on the other side.

But there is also a way to recognize the Mother of Source Stones on the other side, that is, if you hold it in your hand, if you probe it, you will sense the breath inside it that far surpasses that of other Source Stones on the other side.

Thus.

Every bone transformation realm that finds the source stone on the other side has to take a serious peek.

And not long after, a large number of Bone Transformation Realms from the Ice Beast Palace arrived here.

Gu Heng Mountain's Origin Realm tried to stop it, but it was stopped by the Ice Beast Palace's Origin Realm.

A brief fight broke out between the two sides.

And those Bone Transformation Realm Ice Beasts successfully entered this eighth-level personal world.

The eighth-level personal world.

A bone transformation realm of Gu Heng Mountain fought with this group of ice beasts, while the other bone transformation realms were still looking for the origin mother on the other side.

Time passed slowly.

Whether it is Gu Heng Mountain or the Ice Beast Palace, there is a bone transformation realm that has fallen.

But for the sake of the Mother Stone of the Other Shore this time, as well as a large number of Source Stones of the Other Shore, both sides will not give up.

As for these bone transformation realms, if they die, they will die, and they will not affect the foundation of both sides.

this day.

When Ye Tian was looking for the Origin Stone Mother on the other side, he was targeted by several Boundary-Breaking Geniuses of the Ice Beast Palace.

"Hahaha, the team that killed Gu Heng Mountain is so weak!"

These Nine Bone Transformation Realm Breaking Geniuses came over and killed.

And the group of envoys and patrol envoys behind Ye Tian were all gloating, thinking that the bone transformation realm of these Ice Beast Palaces was about to die.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian made a move.

In a short period of time, he killed these bone transformation realms.
